'''鈭歴h-t-g''' ('''kashatag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zonk|zonk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-t-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zonk|zonk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-t-g
|-
! Lemma
| kashatag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishatag|thishatag]] || [[word:jishatag|jishatag]] || [[word:shishatag|shishatag]] || [[word:kishatag|kishatag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushatag|thuthushatag]] || [[word:jujushatag|jujushatag]] || [[word:shushushatag|shushushatag]] || [[word:kukushatag|kukushatag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushatag|thushatag]] || [[word:jushatag|jushatag]] || [[word:shushatag|shushatag]] || [[word:kushatag|kushatag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushatag|thushatag]] || [[word:jushatag|jushatag]] || [[word:shushatag|shushatag]] || [[word:kushatag|kushatag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshatag|theshatag]] || [[word:jeshatag|jeshatag]] || [[word:sheshatag|sheshatag]] || [[word:keshatag|keshatag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshatag|thothoshatag]] || [[word:jojoshatag|jojoshatag]] || [[word:shoshoshatag|shoshoshatag]] || [[word:kokoshatag|kokoshatag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshatag|thoshatag]] || [[word:joshatag|joshatag]] || [[word:shoshatag|shoshatag]] || [[word:koshatag|koshatag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshatag|thoshatag]] || [[word:joshatag|joshatag]] || [[word:shoshatag|shoshatag]] || [[word:koshatag|koshatag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shatag|shatag]] || [[word:shatag|shatag]] || [[word:shatag|shatag]] || [[word:shatag|shatag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shatag|shatag]] || [[word:shatag|shatag]] || [[word:shatag|shatag]] || [[word:shatag|shatag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shatag|shatag]] || [[word:shatag|shatag]] || [[word:shatag|shatag]] || [[word:shatag|shatag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shatag|shatag]] || [[word:shatag|shatag]] || [[word:shatag|shatag]] || [[word:shatag|shatag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙shatag|th忙shatag]] || [[word:j忙shatag|j忙shatag]] || [[word:sh忙shatag|sh忙shatag]] || [[word:k忙shatag|k忙shatag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashatag|thathashatag]] || [[word:jajashatag|jajashatag]] || [[word:shashashatag|shashashatag]] || [[word:kakashatag|kakashatag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashatag|thashatag]] || [[word:jashatag|jashatag]] || [[word:shashatag|shashatag]] || [[word:kashatag|kashatag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashatag|thashatag]] || [[word:jashatag|jashatag]] || [[word:shashatag|shashatag]] || [[word:kashatag|kashatag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashatag|shashatag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashatag|goshashatag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashatag|gokishashatag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashatagn眉|shashatagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashatagnkn眉|goshashatagnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashatagn眉|gokishashatagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashatagsh毛|shashatagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashatagnksh毛|goshashatagnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashatagsh毛|gokishashatagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashatagro|shashatagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashatagnkro|goshashatagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashatagro|gokishashatagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashatagmu|shashatagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashatagnkmu|goshashatagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashatagmu|gokishashatagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashatagsher|shashatagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashatagnksher|goshashatagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashatagsher|gokishashatagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashatagng|shashatagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashatagnkng|goshashatagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashatagng|gokishashatagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashatagya|shashatagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashatagnkya|goshashatagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashatagya|gokishashatagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashatagyam|shashatagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashatagnkyam|goshashatagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashatagyam|gokishashatagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashatagn眉sh毛|shashatagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashatagnkn眉sh毛|goshashatagnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashatagn眉sh毛|gokishashatagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashatagn眉ro|shashatagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashatagnkn眉ro|goshashatagnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashatagn眉ro|gokishashatagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashatagn眉mu|shashatagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashatagnkn眉mu|goshashatagnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashatagn眉mu|gokishashatagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashatagsh毛n眉|shashatagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashatagnksh毛n眉|goshashatagnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashatagsh毛n眉|gokishashatagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashatagsh毛ro|shashatagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashatagnksh毛ro|goshashatagnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashatagsh毛ro|gokishashatagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashatagsh毛mu|shashatagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashatagnksh毛mu|goshashatagnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashatagsh毛mu|gokishashatagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashatagron眉|shashatagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashatagnkron眉|goshashatagnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashatagron眉|gokishashatagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashatagrosh毛|shashatagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashatagnkrosh毛|goshashatagnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashatagrosh毛|gokishashatagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashatagromu|shashatagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashatagnkromu|goshashatagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashatagromu|gokishashatagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashatagmun眉|shashatagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashatagnkmun眉|goshashatagnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashatagmun眉|gokishashatagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashatagmush毛|shashatagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashatagnkmush毛|goshashatagnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashatagmush毛|gokishashatagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashatagmuro|shashatagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashatagnkmuro|goshashatagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashatagmuro|gokishashatagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
